commit.subject: LU-13814 osc: brw count can be 16 bits
commit.message:
LU-13814 osc: brw count can be 16 bits

The largest system page size we support is 16K, so there is
no need for the per-page count to be 32 bits - 16 bits is
enough.

This saves two bytes in the brw_page and osc_transfer_page
structs.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
